summary: Completed testing of Elastic Email integration for Global Access Shipping. All email API endpoints working correctly. Frontend integration verified - registration, shipment creation, and status update flows all trigger email notifications with appropriate toast messages.

minor_issues.issue: Loading spinner shows briefly after page refresh before content loads - this is expected behavior during auth state restoration
Console warning: Select is changing from controlled to uncontrolled

passed_tests: Backend: /api/health endpoint returns healthy status with email_configured=true
Backend: /api/email/welcome endpoint sends welcome email successfully
Backend: /api/email/shipment-created endpoint sends shipment notification email
Backend: /api/email/shipment-update endpoint sends status update email
Backend: All 11 pytest tests passed (100% success rate)
Frontend: Registration flow works - toast shows 'Account created successfully! Check your email for a welcome message.'
Frontend: Create shipment flow works - console shows 'Shipment notification email sent'
Frontend: Status update flow works - console shows 'Status update email sent to recipient'
Frontend: Session persistence works - user stays logged in after page refresh
Frontend: Admin can view and update shipment status
Frontend: Tracking history displays correctly with timeline
Frontend: Realtime updates working (Live badge visible, events logged)
critical_code_review_comments: Email service is working correctly with Elastic Email free tier (can only send to sasbaws22@gmail.com)
Toast messages correctly mention email notifications for all flows
Console logs confirm emails are being sent successfully
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test users (customer and admin) and 2 shipments for testing email flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Elastic Email integration is fully working. Free tier limitation: emails can only be sent TO sasbaws22@gmail.com. All email flows tested: welcome email on registration, shipment created notification, status update notification. Session persistence working correctly. Test users: admin_test_1774395957@test.com (admin) and test_email_1774395801@test.com (customer). Shipments created: GA20260324407D8A (In Transit) and GA20260324B31FB1 (Pending).
